description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat green roof and a spacious, open backyard. The front facade features large windows, a double garage, and a paved driveway. The rear of the bungalow opens to a patio area with outdoor seating, a rectangular swimming pool, and a separate pool house or cabana structure. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes landscaped greenery and a tree in the backyard. The exterior walls are primarily white, with some gray accents and large glass panels. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and a separate pool house, surrounded by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, paved driveway, and large front-facing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the length of the backyard with the pool and pool house visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio, outdoor seating, swimming pool, and the pool house at the far end of the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, garage, and the full extent of the backyard and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
